title: Passionnelle
writer: Émile Zola, Edmond T. Gréville, Max Joly
actors: Odette Joyeux, André Alerme, Raymond Galle
plot: Julien, a modest postal worker, admires and hopelessly loves Thérèse, the lovely daughter of the local squire. But, quite unexpectedly, on the very night of her engagement with Count of Vétheuil, Thérèse asks Julien for help. In f...
